Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Cohort-specific cognitive vulnerability mapping > Veteran & uniformed-service vulnerability mapping > Veteran-mental-health-stratum vulnerability > Identity-anchor mapping (veteran-MH)

Prepare.path: Prepare > Establish Assets > Targeting-data acquisition (legal commercial + black market + scraping) > Commercial people-data vendors > Marketing-data brokers > Experian Marketing Services

Execute.technique: Trending trigger pressure within content delivery

exposure_network_assignment.edge_meaning: The source position is a visible peer whose output was plausibly exposed to the target position; derived from source user liking, reposting, or quoting target user content in the raw data.
